text: A person may not act as a motor vehicle title service or act as an agent for that business unless that person holds a license issued under this subchapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 520. Misc. Provisions
##### § 520.053 — License Required

A person may not act as a motor vehicle title service or act as an agent for that business unless that person holds a license issued under this subchapter.

*Added by Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 1478, Sec. 2, eff. Sept. 1, 1999.*

subsections.text: A person may not act as a motor vehicle title service or act as an agent for that business unless that person holds a license issued under this subchapter.
